tasks.title: Fix binary path portability
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded absolute paths to the ralph binary with a config discovery layer: check $RALPH_BIN env var first, then PATH lookup, then relative-to-binary fallback. Affects dashboard server (const RALPH_BIN in ralph.ts) and Rust TUI spawn calls in ralph.rs. Small scoped change across 2 files.

tasks.title: Signal file mechanism in ralph bash script
tasks.description: Implement the core signal file protocol in the ralph bash script. Between loop iterations ralph checks ~/.ralph/pids/<name>.signal; if present it reads the content as a mid-run prompt injection, logs it, appends it to the claude conversation, then deletes the file. Scope: ralph bash script only.

tasks.title: TUI prompt injection UI
tasks.description: Add a TUI panel (modal or sidebar) that lets the user type a mid-run prompt and writes it to ~/.ralph/pids/<name>.signal for the selected ralph. Touches ralph-tui/src/app.rs (key handler + state), ralph-tui/src/ui.rs (panel render), and ralph-tui/src/ralph.rs (signal_file helper). Depends on TASK-002a for the file protocol.

tasks.title: Dashboard prompt injection UI
tasks.description: Add a form or button in the SvelteKit dashboard that posts a prompt string to a new server action, which writes it to ~/.ralph/pids/<name>.signal. Touches dashboard/src/lib/server/ralph.ts (writeSignal function + endpoint) and dashboard/src/routes/+page.svelte (UI). Depends on TASK-002a for the file protocol.

tasks.title: JSONL log capture in ralph bash script
tasks.description: Tee the claude --stream-json stdout into a structured .jsonl file alongside the existing human-readable .log file (e.g. ~/.ralph/logs/<name>.jsonl). The .log keeps existing format; .jsonl stores raw JSON events one-per-line. No visual output changes. Scope: ralph bash script and ralph-status for any status changes needed.

tasks.title: TUI JSONL awareness
tasks.description: Update the Rust TUI to surface data parsed from the .jsonl file: show token count and estimated cost per run in the instance detail view. Reads from the .jsonl file path derived from the log path. Scope: ralph-tui/src/ralph.rs (parse jsonl for token/cost fields, expose on RalphInstance) and ralph-tui/src/ui.rs (render them). Depends on TASK-003a for the .jsonl files.

tasks.title: Git worktree isolation core in ralph script
tasks.description: Add an --isolated flag to the ralph bash script. When set: before spawning, create a git worktree in a temp dir (git worktree add /tmp/ralph-<name>-<ts> -b ralph/<name>), cd into it, run the agent there, and on exit optionally push the branch and open a PR via gh. Cleanup the worktree after PR is opened or on --no-pr. Scope: ralph bash script only.

tasks.title: TUI worktree status display
tasks.description: Surface worktree info in the Rust TUI: parse the worktree path from the .meta file and show it in the instance detail panel. Add an 'isolated' badge to the instance list when a worktree is active. Scope: ralph-tui/src/ralph.rs (parse worktree_path from meta), ralph-tui/src/ui.rs (render badge/path). Depends on TASK-004a writing worktree_path into the .meta file.

tasks.title: Dashboard worktree support
tasks.description: Add an 'Isolated (worktree)' toggle to the spawn form in the SvelteKit dashboard, pass --isolated to ralph when set. Show worktree path in the instance card when active. Scope: dashboard/src/lib/server/ralph.ts (pass --isolated flag) and dashboard/src/routes/+page.svelte (toggle + display). Depends on TASK-004a.

tasks.title: DAG pipeline spec format and validator
tasks.description: Define the YAML/JSON schema for a multi-agent pipeline: nodes (ralph configs: name, prompt, model, flags) and edges (depends_on, trigger condition, output_key). Write example pipelines and a validate-pipeline script that checks for cycles, missing node refs, and schema errors. No orchestration execution yet. Scope: new files only (schema, examples, validate script).

tasks.title: DAG orchestrator: topological sort and spawner
tasks.description: Build the core orchestrator script (ralph-pipeline) that reads a validated pipeline spec, computes topological order, spawns ralphs in dependency order (waiting for each to complete before unblocking dependents), and tracks pipeline-level state (running/done/failed per node). Scope: ralph-pipeline script. Depends on TASK-005a for the spec format.

tasks.title: DAG inter-agent output passing
tasks.description: Capture each ralph's output (last N lines of log or a designated output section) and inject it into downstream agents' prompts via the signal file mechanism. Each dependent node gets a context preamble containing upstream outputs keyed by output_key. Scope: ralph-pipeline script additions + integration with TASK-002a signal files.

tasks.title: Pipeline monitoring in TUI and dashboard
tasks.description: Show pipeline-level state in the TUI and dashboard: a pipeline view listing all nodes with status (waiting/running/done/failed) and edges visualized as a dependency tree or list. TUI adds a new tab; dashboard adds a /pipeline route or section. Reads pipeline state from a ralph-pipeline state file. Depends on TASK-005b for the state format.

tasks.title: Analytics JSONL aggregation API
tasks.description: Add a server-side analytics function in dashboard/src/lib/server/ralph.ts that scans all .jsonl files, parses token usage and tool call events, aggregates per-run and cumulative stats (input/output tokens, cost by model pricing table, tool-call frequency, success/failure counts), and exposes them via a +page.server.ts load function for the /analytics route. Depends on TASK-003a for the .jsonl files.

tasks.title: Analytics frontend page
tasks.description: Build the /analytics SvelteKit page that displays aggregated data from TASK-006a: per-run token count table, cumulative cost chart, tool-call frequency bar chart, and success/failure rate. Use plain SVG or a lightweight chart lib already in the project. Scope: dashboard/src/routes/analytics/+page.svelte only. Depends on TASK-006a for the data shape.

tasks.title: CLI prompt injection command
tasks.description: Add a small ralph-status inject <name> command that writes plaintext to ~/.ralph/pids/<name>.signal for the backend signal protocol. Keep scope to the CLI fallback path and avoid changing TUI/dashboard injection flows.

tasks.title: TUI pending injection indicator
tasks.description: Show when a selected running instance already has a pending .signal prompt so users know an injection is queued before the next loop iteration.

tasks.title: Dashboard pending injection indicator
tasks.description: Show when a selected dashboard instance already has a queued .signal prompt so users know to wait for ralph to consume it before sending another injection.

tasks.title: Native PTY runtime for embedded TUI terminal
tasks.description: Add a focused PTY runtime for ralph-tui native terminal popup: spawn shell in selected cwd, non-blocking read/write, resize, and clean shutdown. Use portable-pty + vt100 with a small adapter API consumable by app/ui layers. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: App state and key routing for native terminal popup
tasks.description: Integrate native terminal lifecycle into app state and event handling. Repurpose keybinding T to open native popup from list/log context, route input to terminal while active, and reserve Ctrl-G as escape back to prior view. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: Render native embedded terminal popup in ratatui
tasks.description: Implement popup rendering for the native embedded terminal using terminal screen snapshot output, with compact status/hint line and dynamic size-to-PTY resize propagation. Preserve current left-right base view under overlay. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: Native terminal docs and regression coverage
tasks.description: Add targeted regression coverage for popup lifecycle/key routing (including Ctrl-G escape) and update user-facing keybinding docs so T is native popup and t remains tmux split. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: Profile native terminal input latency
tasks.description: Investigate typing latency in the native terminal popup (non-tmux path). Add lightweight timing instrumentation for key-to-render and PTY drain-to-render intervals, capture baseline numbers, and identify top hotspots. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: Optimize native terminal typing/render latency
tasks.description: Implement latency fixes for native terminal mode based on profiling: reduce per-frame allocation churn, make PTY output application incremental, and tune redraw/tick behavior for faster key echo while preserving CPU headroom. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.

tasks.title: Dock native terminal on right side of TUI
tasks.description: Add a right-docked native terminal layout mode so the shell appears as a persistent pane on the right side of the TUI instead of popup-only. Include pane width policy and close/return key behavior consistent with current key model. Keep scope small for one agent (~70% context): <=3 files and <=250 net LOC.
